title: Crispy Meal Prep Bites
description: A healthy and easy-to-make snack perfect for meal prep, combining tangy and crispy textures with fermented flavors.
instructions: 2. Mix crispy rice cereal, fermented soybeans, and prep spices in a bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together meal prep oil and tangy apple cider vinegar.
4. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
5. Use a cookie scoop to form the mixture into balls.
6. Place the balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Allow the bites to cool completely before serving.
